history.user: What the morale of The Proud Rose?
history.ai: The moral of "The Proud Rose" centers on the themes of pride and humility. It teaches that excessive pride can lead to one's downfall, while embracing humility can foster growth and connection with others. The story illustrates that true beauty lies not in arrogance but in the ability to appreciate oneself and others without superiority.

history.ai:
Available commands:
  /help     : Show this help message
  /exit     : Exit the chat session
  /history  : Show in-memory session history (user + concise AI replies)
  /save     : Save the current session to a JSON file in the sessions/ folder
  /extract  : Run the concise-answer extractor over the session raw outputs
  /restore <id> : Restore a previously saved session by id or name
